titleStmt.title: SII 30.224: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 224. (A.R. No. 575 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha Temple—at the entrance into the mukhamaṇḍapa in front of the same shrine: right side. Jaṭ. Kulasēkara-Pāṇḍya: Year 11: 13th C.A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of 50 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp and also a lamp stand to the temple of Piṇakkaṟukkum Mahādēvar at Malaiyaḍikkuṟichchi, a hamlet of Śrī Parāntaka chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Āri-nāḍu by Ariyān Āndān alias Vānakōvaraiyaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ of Maṇapaḍaivīḍu, northern hamlet of Śri Va[l*]lavamaṅgalam in Kīḷkarai-Kūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa [tiripuvaṉacakkaravat]tikaḷ śrīkulacekara devaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu Ārināṭṭu brahma
deyam śrī parāntaka caturvetimaṅkalattuppiṭākai malaiaṭikkuṟicciyil Uṭaiyār piṇakkaṟukkum mahādevaṟku kiḷ
karai kūṟṟattu śrī vallavamaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākai maṇapaṭaiviṭṭi lirukkum yāṉ Ariyāṉ Āṇṭāṉ
Āṉa vāṇakovaraiyaṉ pallavaraiyaṉ Ittevaṟkku Ivāṇṭai tai māta mutal 2 cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Iṭ
nuntāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Iṭṭa Āṭu 5 10 Aimpatu cāvā muvā perāṭu Ākavum I viḷakku Eriya nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
